title: ¿Dónde vas, Alfonso XII?
writer: Luis César Amadori, Juan Ignacio Luca de Tena, Luis Marquina
actors: Vicente Parra, Paquita Rico, Mercedes Vecino
plot: The youth of Prince Alfonso who would become King Alfonso XII of Spain after Queen Isabel II abdication, centered in his love for his cousin María de las Mercedes. Daughter of one of his mother's political opponents, their marriag...
